hooks.command: PORT="${NYX_MCP_PORT:-8765}"; URL="http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/mcp"; if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then INPUT=$(cat); ARGS=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -c --arg tid "$NYX_TERMINAL_ID" '. + {NYX_TERMINAL_ID: $tid}'); curl -s --max-time 1 -X POST "$URL" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d "$(printf '{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":1,\"method\":\"tools/call\",\"params\":{\"name\":\"agent_session_event\",\"arguments\":%s}}' "$ARGS")" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; else curl -s --max-time 1 -X POST "$URL" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"probe","arguments":{}}}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi

PORT="${NYX_MCP_PORT:-8765}"; URL="http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/mcp"; if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then INPUT=$(cat); ARGS=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -c --arg tid "$NYX_TERMINAL_ID" '. + {NYX_TERMINAL_ID: $tid}'); curl -s --max-time 1 -X POST "$URL" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d "$(printf '{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":1,\"method\":\"tools/call\",\"params\":{\"name\":\"agent_session_event\",\"arguments\":%s}}' "$ARGS")" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; else curl -s --max-time 1 -X POST "$URL" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"probe","arguments":{}}}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi
